description: ZERO PRINT exhaustion. Bar with a level at 20002.00 inside the body (open=20000,close=20004) where askVol=0 and bidVol=0. EXH-01 is delta-gate exempt — fires regardless of delta.

bar.notes: Level at 20002.00 is inside the body (bodyBot=20000, bodyTop=20004) with zero vol. Delta gate is DeltaGateEnabled=false in this fixture so EXH-02..06 are suppressed; EXH-01 fires unconditionally.
